mission.title: grpc: gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to complete
mission.description: gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to complete. This issue affects 21+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?

Ruby 3.1.1 

`gem install grpc:1.45.0`

### What operating system (Linux, Windows,...) and version?

* M1 osx (no issue - all fine)
* AWS hosted Ubuntu 20.04 VM with 4GB Ram & SSD.

steps.title: Apply the fix for gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to complete
steps.description:
This adds pre-built library for aarch64 linux, will help improve the install speed and avoid building environment issues at customer side.

  Can you help build and push the new rake compiler image?
Will update the tag and hash after the image is available

Manually tested locally:
```
uname
```yaml
FROM ruby:3.1.1
RUN gem install grpc:1.45.0
```

steps.title: Confirm gem install grpc:1.45.0  takes lot of time to… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: This adds pre-built library for aarch64 linux, will help improve the install speed and avoid building environment issues at customer side.
codeSnippets:
FROM ruby:3.1.1
RUN gem install grpc:1.45.0

uname -a
Linux u20 5.15.49-linuxkit #1 SMP PREEMPT Tue Sep 13 07:51:32 UTC 2022 aarch64 aarch64 aarch64 GNU/Linux

time gem install /work/ruby/grpc/pkg/grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux.gem
Successfully installed grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux
Parsing documentation for grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux
Installing ri documentation for grpc-1.56.0.dev-aarch64-linux
Done installing documentation for grpc after 0 seconds
1 gem installed

real	0m22.794s
user	0m17.268s
sys	0m5.156s

prerequisites.description: gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
